subject: Re:
body:
andra,, I've decided to send you 5000 dollars, to enable you not to make decisions based on money..please call lesley , or send details so that she may send to your bank.. enjoy



----- Original Message ----
From: Stroe Andra <stroeandramaria@gmail.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, July 22, 2008 5:51:45 PM
Subject: Re:


Hello,

Yes I finished last week, I've got 8,50, I was exepecting more but is ok like that too..and I took a long weekend on the sea side here in Romania in Mamaia..and had a lot of fun with my friend of course.
Onestly I was  thinking how are you doing..and I was in a situation in wich I was thinking what kind of advice you would give me..but after all I made it by myself..wasn't a big deal.
Now that I finish I don't know where should I head too..If I'm gonna do some modeling for a while or ...are you ready? I was thinking to to a course to become a stewardesa..what do you think? At the begining there is a good romanian company (TAROM ) and afterwards you can never know..even though I don't know if is the kind of life I wold prefer..to be always on the go... but it is a thought and a real possibility from my point of view regarding the fact that I like to travel and see as many places in the world as posible.
What about you?
I guess you're not very happy with the place you are in..maybe you'll write me if u have the time how did this happened.
Andra
